cases.prompt: review the design plan for this feature before we implement it

assertions.text: Rates each design dimension 0-10 with a designer's eye
Explains what would make each dimension a 10, then edits the plan to get there
Operates on the plan (plan mode), not a live site visual audit (that is /design-review)
Runs interactively like the CEO and Eng plan reviews
Scores each dimension and shows the path to a 10 before changing the plan
